(a) There are **17** open pull requests across all repositories.

(b) The repository with the most open pull requests is **acme/infra**, with **9** open pull requests.

tool_calls.name: execute_js
tool_calls.input: {"code":"const prs = github.list_pull_requests({ state: 'open' }); console.log('Total open PRs:', prs.length); const repoCounts = {}; prs.forEach(p => { repoCounts[p.repo] = (repoCounts[p.repo] || 0) + 1; }); const sorted = Object.entries(repoCounts).sort((a, b) => b[1] - a[1]); console.log('Repository with most open PRs:', sorted[0][0], 'with', sorted[0][1], 'PRs'); sorted[0][1]"}

text:

(b) The repository with the most open pull requests is **acme/infra**, with **9** open pull requests.
